products.title: Rich Kids From The Countryside
products.description:
Comfort Colors introduces the “Comfort Colors 1717” garment-dyed t-shirt; a fully customizable tee made with 100% ring-spun cotton. The soft-washed, garment-dyed fabric brings extra coziness to your wardrobe while the relaxed fit makes it an excellent daily choice. The double-needle stitching throughout the tee makes it highly durable, while the lack of side seams helps the shirt retain its tubular shape. Discover all 58 colors in our charts below.


.: Heavyweight fabric (6.1 oz/yd² (206.8 g/m²))
.: Relaxed fit
.: Pre-shrunk 100% ring-spun US cotton
.: Available in 58 colors
.: Sewn-in label

products.title: AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY
products.description:
A soft, vintage-feel long sleeve that reads like a quiet statement. The clean white fabric and bold back print-"AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY"-give it a minimalist, utilitarian edge. Wear it layered under a denim jacket for city errands or alone on cool mornings when you want to move through the day with a little guarded wit. The thicker, eco-friendly cotton drapes with subtle weight, while ribbed cuffs and taped shoulders keep the silhouette steady after many washes. It’s the kind of shirt that quietly signals boundaries and dry humor to people who notice.

Product features
- Eco-friendly thicker cotton with vintage hand and medium weight (6.0 oz/yd²).
- Tubular knit without side seams to reduce waste and create a clean drape.
- Ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention and stability.
- Classic fit with sewn-in label; runs smaller than usual, consider sizing up.
- Fiber blends vary by color; solid whites are 100% cotton and meet EU REACH requirements.

Care instructions
- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
- Do not dryclean
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Tumble dry: medium heat
- Do not iron

products.title: TACTICAL
products.description:
Slip into this all-over print tee and step into the role, gritty, prepared, and focused. The front shows a tactical vest loaded with supply pouches and a digital timer, the back continues the armored texture for a seamless, immersive look. It feels light against the skin yet built to hold its shape, so you can wear it during long game nights, conventions, or while crafting a cosplayed loadout. Short bursts of movement feel effortless; the shirt sits close without clinging, letting the detailed artwork speak loud and clear.

This piece brings a subtle edge to everyday wear. Wear it to a LAN, a themed meetup, or when you want to channel that calculated, ready-for-anything mindset. It reads like a nod to tactical gear and gaming utility, familiar terms for those who love loadout customization and immersive character design.

Product features
- 100% brushed polyester for durable, shape-retaining wear and quick drying
- Lightweight fabric (5.16 oz/yd²), breathable comfort for long sessions
- All-over print with seam-matched thread color for a clean, continuous design
- Double-needle stitching on sleeve, neck, and hem for reinforced durability
- Size and care info printed in collar; assembled in the USA from global components

Care instructions
- Do not dryclean
- Do not iron
- Tumble dry: low heat
- Do not bleach
- Machine wash: warm (max 40C or 105F)

products.title: PING PONG
products.description:
A soft, midweight cotton tee printed with a simple, nostalgic emblem: a single warm-orange sphere marked by three black stars across its center. The image sits centered on a clean white background, giving the shirt a minimalist, retro-vintage vibe that reads casual and thoughtful. Wear it when you want an easy, wearable piece that quietly references fan culture without shouting. The classic crew neckline and relaxed fit make it comfortable for everyday wear, mornings at the coffee shop, laid-back meetups, or long drives where comfort and a subtle statement matter most.

Product features
- Medium-weight 100% cotton body (5.3 oz/yd²) for year-round comfort
- Classic crew neckline with ribbed, shape-retaining collar
- Tubular knit construction (no side seams) for a smooth silhouette
- Durable, detailed prints: DTF for sleeves/neck label and DTG for main design
- Twill shoulder tape and tear-away label for stability and itch-free wear

Care instructions
- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
- Do not iron
- Do not dryclean
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Tumble dry: low heat
